title: stachys cordata
intro: Stachys cordata, also known as the Wood Betony, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stachys cordata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Wood Betony may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
